name: claude-code-headless
description: Programmatically control Claude Code through a headless terminal — structured JSON events, automated commands, async streaming API

scripts.build: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/proxy/mitmAddon.py dist/proxy/mitmAddon.py
scripts.test:package: npm run build && node scripts/test-package.mjs --require dist/proxy/mitmAddon.py
scripts.check: npm run test:contract && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:package
